prompt: A photorealistic satirical airport tarmac scene in daylight, shot vertically, showing a sleek white private jet parked with its door open and stairs visible on the left. On the side of the jet, large clean corporate lettering reads “Google | ANTHROPIC”. In the foreground, 2 adult male executives in dark navy business suits embrace in a celebratory hug, centered slightly left. The man facing camera-left has curly dark hair and wears a charcoal suit; the other man, with short dark hair and a white dress shirt under a navy suit, holds a thick fan of U.S. $100 bills in one hand while hugging. Their expressions should feel triumphant and conspiratorial. In the midground and right side, 2 additional adult men in dark suits push 2 metal airport luggage carts overflowing with tightly bundled stacks of cash. The left cart has a black front panel labeled “Google” in multicolor corporate-style lettering, and the right cart has a black front panel labeled “Deep Pockets Division” in white sans-serif text. Count exactly 2 carts and show both piled high with money bricks wrapped in bank bands. The private jet extends across most of the background, with oval windows, a visible rear engine on the right, and a partly cloudy blue sky above. The ground is wet and reflective, adding glossy reflections under the people and carts. Editorial photojournalism style, ultra-realistic lighting, sharp focus, subtle depth of field, luxury wealth satire, corporate power imagery, high-detail textures on suits, aircraft metal, and cash bundles.
